---
id: get-pre-payment-option
title: "Retrieve Pre Payment Check response."
description: "This endpoint allows you to retrieve the pre payment options for specific user using tabby integrated API."
sidebar_label: "Retrieve Pre Payment Check response."
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Retrieve Pre Payment Check response."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/checkout/api/sdk/v1/pre-payment-option-check/{session_id}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This endpoint allows you to retrieve the pre payment options for specific user using tabby integrated API.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
